title: Citrusy Silky Kenyan Shortcrust Pastry Bowl
description: A refreshing and healthy shortcrust pastry dish from Kenya, perfect for a sick day. This citrusy and silky bowl is a great way to enjoy a sugar-free meal.
instructions: Roll out the shortcrust pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Transfer the dough to an earthenware bowl, pressing it into the bottom and sides of the bowl.
Prick the dough with a fork to prevent it from bubbling up during baking.
Mix the grated carrots, orange zest, and orange juice in a bowl.
Pour the carrot mixture into the pastry-lined bowl.
Beat the egg in a small bowl and mix it with the sugar-free sweetener.
Pour the egg mixture over the carrot mixture in the bowl.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake the bowl in the preheated oven for 35 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
Remove the bowl from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
